basis: Deterministic adjudication against raw evidence (parsed CSVs + read-only NTFS mounts). See scoring/adjudication.md. v1 oracle corrected: patient zero, initial access, primary RAT, exfil.

non_attacker.10.3.16.5: Incident-response / examiner host (F-Response iSCSI + RDP). rsydow type-10 RDP from here is IR activity, not attacker.

milestones.attack: T1189 Drive-by / T1204 User Execution (signed Java applet)
milestones.summary: tdungan compromised via malicious signed Java applet Signed_Update.jar served from 207.58.245.179; downloaded second-stage PE from 207.58.245.179:80/tY77np5Yyi.
Patient zero = xp-tdungan (10.3.58.7); first malicious activity 2012-04-03 00:33, ~18h before any other host.
milestones.citation: tdungan MFT $FN 00:33; nromanoff first inbound PsExec/4624 FROM 10.3.58.7 @ 21:11

milestones.summary: Primary implant = httppump HTTP backdoor masquerading as C:\Windows\system32\dllhost\svchost.exe (MD5 4c7906e2f2a82fdfad74b47c90350771); loader a.exe (c4b0458c04abdaa773348c2668212b45). On tdungan, nromanoff, nfury.
milestones.citation: md5sum on mounts (tdungan, nromanoff); PDB winclient.pdb / i.pdb

milestones.summary: Secondary PyInstaller-packed implant spinlock.exe (6bff2aebb8852fc2658b9768d2166ece) beaconing to 199.73.28.114:443; process injection into svchost.exe (malfind MZ-in-RWX).

HKLM Run value svchost=c:\windows\system32\dllhost\svchost.exe (tdungan, nromanoff); service winsvchost=cmd /k …dllhost\svchost.exe (nromanoff 7045 @ 23:52); Netman\domain C2 config; at jobs (DC, nfury).
milestones.citation: Vol3 printkey; nromanoff System.evtx 7045; winclient.reg; nfury MFT \Windows\Tasks

milestones.attack: T1003 OS Credential Dumping / T1078 Valid Accounts
milestones.summary: Credential theft and reuse of domain accounts incl. domain-admin SHIELDBASE\vibranium (4672) and rsydow/SRL-Helpdesk; tooling mimikatz sekurlsa.dll + avbypass.exe (nromanoff), procdump (DC).
milestones.citation: nromanoff MFT sekurlsa.dll; DC Security.evtx 4672 vibranium; cross-host profiles
milestones.note: wceisvista.inf is NOT valid WCE evidence (legit winsxs INF) — see adjudication.md.

milestones.summary: tdungan -> nromanoff (04-03 21:11) -> DC (04-04, RDP type-10 vibranium from 10.3.58.7 @ 18:17:53) -> nfury (04-05/06), via PsExec (7045) + stolen creds + at jobs.
Per-host httppump C2: tdungan http://199.73.28.114/ads/, nromanoff http://12.190.135.235/ads/, build-default http://192.168.1.5/ads/. spinlock C2 199.73.28.114:443. Delivery 207.58.245.179.

milestones.attack: T1560 Archive Collected Data / T1074 Staging
milestones.summary: Data staged on nfury into password/header-encrypted RAR system4.rar (6,297,428 bytes, MD5 06a889b10ea9465e46554d6460f29bf2) at \Users\Public\Temp, 2012-04-06.
usboesrv.exe / 96.255.98.154 is legitimate USB-over-Ethernet (not C2); 10.3.16.5 is the IR host (rsydow type-10 RDP from it is response activity). Correctly excluding these = self-correction credit.
milestones.citation: DC MFT \Program Files\USB over Ethernet; install 2012-03-20
